eng.definition: eager or quick to argue or fight; aggressively defiant
examples: His truculent attitude made it difficult for others to work with him.
She had a truculent reputation, always ready for a fight.
Despite his truculent exterior, he was a gentle soul.
मुझे उसकी सफलता का आनंद हुआ।
वह अपनी जीत का आनंद ले रहा है।
